examples: I ordered a sherbet, not an ice cream.
I like vanilla ice cream but I don't like lemon sherbet.
Gaga wore her sherbet-colored hair swirled into a beehive bun and donned an elegant Naeem Khan one-strap gown.
To really gild the lily, you could also throw in a scoop of pineapple sherbet.
The orange sherbet is on you, Drapers, and word to the wise: Don't drive off without your wife.
